message:
🐛 Fix logo resolver: prefix regex was stripping first 2 chars of all names (#48)

- Fix normalization regex: only strip when separator present (US-P|, UK|, CA:)
- CBS, ABC, Food Network etc. now match correctly
- Add usa-/us- prefix stripping as alias strategy
- Prefer -logo variants over -nfl/-news/-sport in prefix matching

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
